steps.action: Run go test with -run filter for TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshaler, TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshalerWithInt, TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshalerError, TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshalerPointer, TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshalerWithMap
steps.observed: All 5 tests pass: TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshaler, TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshalerWithInt, TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshalerError, TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshalerPointer, TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshalerWithMap

steps.action: Read test source to verify coverage of assertion: UnmarshalConfig(v any) error called with raw parsed value, errors propagated
steps.expected: Tests cover: (1) string value passed to UnmarshalConfig, (2) int64 value passed, (3) error propagation, (4) pointer receiver, (5) map value passed
steps.observed: TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshaler: customType receives raw string 'hello', transforms to 'HELLO'. TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshalerWithInt: receives int64 42, sets data='INT'. TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshalerError: errorUnmarshaler returns error, verified it propagates. TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshalerPointer: *customType pointer allocated and UnmarshalConfig called. TestUnmarshalCustomUnmarshalerWithMap: customType receives map[string]any from block syntax.

assertions.title: Unknown/extra config fields - strict and permissive modes

steps.action: Run go test with -run filter for TestUnmarshalPermissiveMode, TestUnmarshalStrictModeRejectsUnknown, TestUnmarshalStrictModeAllowsKnown, TestUnmarshalStrictModeNilOptions
steps.observed: All 4 tests pass: TestUnmarshalPermissiveMode, TestUnmarshalStrictModeRejectsUnknown, TestUnmarshalStrictModeAllowsKnown, TestUnmarshalStrictModeNilOptions

steps.action: Read test source to verify coverage of assertion: strict mode returns error, permissive mode ignores, both modes available
steps.expected: Tests cover: (1) permissive mode ignores unknown keys, (2) strict mode rejects unknown keys with descriptive error, (3) strict mode allows known keys, (4) nil options defaults to permissive
steps.observed: TestUnmarshalPermissiveMode: default Unmarshal() ignores 'unknown_key' and 'extra_field', assigns known 'name'. TestUnmarshalStrictModeRejectsUnknown: UnmarshalWith with Strict:true returns error containing 'unknown config key' and the key name 'unknown_key'. TestUnmarshalStrictModeAllowsKnown: strict mode with only known keys succeeds. TestUnmarshalStrictModeNilOptions: UnmarshalWith with nil options behaves as permissive. Both modes available via UnmarshalWith/UnmarshalOptions API.

steps.action: Run go test with -run filter for TestUnmarshalFileValid, TestUnmarshalFileMissing, TestUnmarshalFileInvalidSyntax, TestUnmarshalFileWithIncludes, TestUnmarshalFileStrict, TestUnmarshalFileNonPointer, TestUnmarshalFileWithRelativeInclude
steps.observed: All 7 tests pass: TestUnmarshalFileValid, TestUnmarshalFileMissing, TestUnmarshalFileInvalidSyntax, TestUnmarshalFileWithIncludes, TestUnmarshalFileStrict, TestUnmarshalFileNonPointer, TestUnmarshalFileWithRelativeInclude

steps.action: Read test source to verify coverage of assertion: missing file returns path error, invalid syntax returns parse error, includes resolved relative to file path
steps.expected: Tests cover: (1) valid file unmarshals, (2) missing file returns *os.PathError, (3) invalid syntax returns error, (4) includes resolved with absolute path, (5) strict mode with file, (6) non-pointer target error, (7) relative include resolution
steps.observed: TestUnmarshalFileValid: writes temp file with 'name=test port=4222', verifies correct unmarshal. TestUnmarshalFileMissing: calls UnmarshalFile with nonexistent path, asserts errors.As(*os.PathError). TestUnmarshalFileInvalidSyntax: writes invalid config 'name {\n', verifies error returned. TestUnmarshalFileWithIncludes: creates included.conf with port=6222, main.conf with include directive, verifies port from include. TestUnmarshalFileStrict: writes file with extra key, verifies strict mode rejects. TestUnmarshalFileNonPointer: passes Config{} (non-pointer), verifies error. TestUnmarshalFileWithRelativeInclude: creates subdir 'includes/ports.conf', main.conf with relative include './includes/ports.conf', verifies port=9222 from relative include.

summary: Tested 3 assertions (16 tests total): all 3 passed. VAL-UNMARSHAL-014 (5 tests) verifies custom Unmarshaler interface with string/int/map values, error propagation, and pointer receivers. VAL-UNMARSHAL-016 (4 tests) verifies strict mode rejects unknown keys and permissive mode ignores them, with both modes available via UnmarshalWith API. VAL-UNMARSHAL-018 (7 tests) verifies UnmarshalFile with valid files, missing file PathError, invalid syntax errors, absolute and relative include resolution, strict mode, and non-pointer target errors.
